reference: I am Ved, twenty-nine years old in the software field. I have back pain when I bend forward towards my knees. It does not radiate anywhere. Actually, it started when I tried lifting a weight, and it has gotten worse since then. I applied Volini and Moov, but it did not help. Although I have taken rest for two months, it is not improving. What can I do? Please help.
text: I am Veg, 29 years old in the software field. I have back pain when I bend forward towards my knees. It does not radiate anywhere. Actually, it started when I tried lifting a weight, and it has gotten worse since then. I applied Belenium Moon, but it did not help. Although I have taken rest for two months, it is not improving. What can I do? Please help.
